help_full:
gen — quick Brazilian test data generation

Usage:
  gen <resource> [arguments] [flags]

Resources:
  cpf         Generate a valid CPF
  cnpj        Generate a valid CNPJ
  cep         Return a real postal code (optional: state, city)
  card        Generate valid card number (brand [BIN])
  version     Show version
  help        Show this help

Examples:
  gen cpf
  gen cpf -f
  gen cnpj --format
  gen cep
  gen cep es
  gen cep es vitoria
  gen card visa
  gen card master
  gen card visa 405168

Global flags:
  -h, --help        help
  -v, --version     version
  -c, --clipboard   also copy result to clipboard
help_cep:
gen cep — return a real postal code

Usage:
  gen cep [state] [city]

Examples:
  gen cep
  gen cep es
  gen cep es vitoria
  gen cep sp campinas
help_card:
gen card — generate valid card number for testing

Usage:
  gen card <brand> [bin]

Brands: visa, master, amex, elo, hipercard

Examples:
  gen card visa
  gen card master
  gen card visa 405168
  gen card elo 636297
clipboard_failed: warning: could not copy to clipboard
cep_no_results: no postal code found for state=%s city=%s
cep_city_min_chars: city must be at least 3 characters
